modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to connect to Smart Devices Network due to error.

full_description_text: I am having trouble connecting to the Smart Devices Network. I received an error message stating that it can't validate the identity provider return message, and the status code is not success. This issue occurred while I was trying to access the network through Wifi.
short_description: Unable to connect to Smart Devices Network due to error.
description: I am having trouble connecting to the Smart Devices Network. I received an error message stating that it can't validate the identity provider return message, and the status code is not success. This issue occurred while I was trying to access the network through Wifi.
